name: AccuKnox-xBOM
description: Generate an SBOM, CBOM or AIBOM and upload it to the AccuKnox Console.
helpMarkDown: Generates a CycloneDX Bill of Materials from your source tree, a container image, or an AI model inventory, then uploads it to the AccuKnox Console and attaches it to the build as an artifact.
author: AccuKnox

inputs.name: bomType
inputs.label: BOM Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: SBOM (packages and dependencies), CBOM (cryptographic assets) or AIBOM (AI/ML model inventory).

inputs.name: accuknoxEndpoint
inputs.label: AccuKnox API Endpoint
inputs.helpMarkDown: Hostname of the AccuKnox Console, without the scheme (e.g. cspm.accuknox.com).

inputs.name: accuknoxToken
inputs.label: AccuKnox Token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Token for authenticating with the AccuKnox Console. Pass this from a secret pipeline variable.

inputs.name: accuknoxLabel
inputs.label: AccuKnox Label
inputs.helpMarkDown: The label created in AccuKnox SaaS for associating results.

inputs.name: projectName
inputs.label: Project Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Must exactly match a project created under Console → SBOM → Projects.

inputs.name: projectClassifier
inputs.label: Project Classifier
inputs.helpMarkDown: Must exactly match the classifier set on the project in the AccuKnox Console.

inputs.name: scanPath
inputs.label: Scan Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory to scan. Ignored when Image Reference is set. Not used for AIBOM.

inputs.name: imageRef
inputs.label: Image Reference
inputs.helpMarkDown: Container image to scan (e.g. myapp:abc1234). The image must be built in the same job. Takes precedence over Scan Path.

inputs.name: aibomSource
inputs.label: AIBOM Source
inputs.helpMarkDown: Where to read the model inventory from.

inputs.name: aibomModel
inputs.label: AIBOM Model
inputs.helpMarkDown: Model ID, e.g. google-bert/bert-base-uncased. Required when AIBOM Source is huggingface.

inputs.name: awsRegion
inputs.label: AWS Region
inputs.helpMarkDown: AWS region for the Bedrock inventory, e.g. us-east-1.

inputs.name: awsAccessKeyId
inputs.label: AWS Access Key ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: AWS access key with the bedrock:ListFoundationModels permission. Pass this from a secret pipeline variable.

inputs.name: awsSecretAccessKey
inputs.label: AWS Secret Access Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: Matching AWS secret access key. Pass this from a secret pipeline variable.

inputs.name: outputFile
inputs.label: Output File
inputs.helpMarkDown: Where to write the BOM. Defaults to <repo>-<bomType>.json in the sources directory.

inputs.name: knoxctlVersion
inputs.label: knoxctl Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Release tag of the knoxctl CLI to download.

inputs.name: skipTlsVerify
inputs.label: Skip TLS Verification
inputs.helpMarkDown: Disable TLS certificate verification when uploading. Only enable this for a Console with a self-signed certificate.
